title: Matrix File
description: A file containing quantification data in a multi-dimension format.

content_type.comment: Content Type describes the content of the file.
enum: allele specific cell by gene matrix
annotated cell by gene and guide matrix
cell by bin methylation count matrix
cell by gene and guide matrix
cell by gene and guide and multiplexing oligo matrix
cell by gene and multiplexing oligo matrix
cell by gene and peak matrix
cell by position methylation count matrix
mitochondrial variants by cell heteroplasmy matrix

enum_descriptions.annotated cell by gene matrix: A matrix where rows represent genes and columns represent samples or cells, containing both counts of sequencing reads that map to each gene and cell annotation data.
enum_descriptions.annotated cell by gene and guide matrix: A feature barcode matrix output from Cell Ranger, where rows represent genes and guides and columns represent cells, containing both counts of sequencing reads that map to each gene and cell annotation data.
enum_descriptions.annotated cell by guide matrix: A feature barcode matrix output from Cell Ranger, where rows represent guides and columns represent cells, containing both counts of sequencing reads that map to each gene and cell annotation data.
enum_descriptions.annotated cell by peak matrix: A matrix used in assays like ATAC-seq or ChIP-seq, where rows represent genomic regions (peaks) and columns represent samples or cells, containing both counts of sequencing reads that map to each peak and cell annotation data.
enum_descriptions.cell by bin contact matrix: A matrix used in genomic assays, particularly in chromosome conformation capture techniques like Hi-C, to represent the frequency of physical interactions between different binned regions of the genome.
enum_descriptions.cell by bin methylation count matrix: A h5ad object containing CpG-level methylation counts/coverage per cell per bin.
enum_descriptions.cell by gene matrix: A matrix where rows represent genes and columns represent samples or cells, containing counts of sequencing reads that map to each gene.
enum_descriptions.cell by gene and guide matrix: A feature barcode matrix output from Cell Ranger, where rows represent genes and guides and columns represent cells.
enum_descriptions.cell by gene and guide and multiplexing: A feature barcode matrix output from Cell Ranger, where rows represent genes, guides, and multiplexing oligos and columns represent cells.
enum_descriptions.cell by gene and multiplexing oligo matr: A feature barcode matrix output from Cell Ranger, where rows represent genes and multiplexing oligos and columns represent cells.
enum_descriptions.cell by gene and peak matrix: A feature barcode matrix output from Cell Ranger, where rows represent genes and peaks and guides and columns represent cells.
enum_descriptions.cell by guide matrix: A feature barcode matrix output from Cell Ranger, where rows represent guides and columns represent cells.
enum_descriptions.cell by peak matrix: A matrix used in assays like ATAC-seq or ChIP-seq, where rows represent genomic regions (peaks) and columns represent samples or cells.
enum_descriptions.cell by position methylation count matri: A h5ad object containing CpG-level methylation counts/coverage per cell per base pair.
enum_descriptions.cell by UMI count matrix: A feature barcode matrix output from Cell Ranger, where rows represent UMI counts and columns represent cells. It contains counts of sequencing reads after filtering out low-quality or low-abundance features.
enum_descriptions.contact matrix: A matrix used in genomic assays, particularly in chromosome conformation capture techniques like Hi-C, to represent the frequency of physical interactions between different regions of the genome.
enum_descriptions.kallisto cell by gene matrix: A tar.gz file containing the output of the kb-python count run directory using the nac mode containing everything except for the h5ad file chosen to be the primary result.
enum_descriptions.mitochondrial variants by cell heteropla: A matrix output from mgatk, where rows are mitochondrial genome positions, and columns are individual cells.
enum_descriptions.spot by gene matrix: A feature barcode matrix output from Space Ranger, where rows represent genes and columns represent barcoded spots.

principal_dimension.title: Principal Dimension
principal_dimension.description: The principal dimension of the matrix.

secondary_dimensions.title: Secondary Dimensions
secondary_dimensions.description: The secondary, tertiary....n levels of dimensions of the matrix.

dbxrefs.comment: This file type currently does not support any external resource submission.
